Notes

Writing directions connected to the work on this site.

This page is intentionally low-profile until real posts are published. The topics below reflect the areas where the hands-on work is strongest.

System design tradeoffs in platform work

How to modernize backend systems without turning every quarter into a migration project.

Internal platform work that actually gets adopted

What changes when templates, standards, and enablement are treated like products instead of side work.

Applied AI retrieval after the novelty phase

Where RAG helps, where it does not, and what operational trust actually requires.

Leadership without heroics

Roadmaps, review rigor, onboarding, and team systems that make delivery more durable.
